title: BestCardRecommendation
description: A single best-card recommendation for a merchant/moment. Recommend-only (FinOS never moves money). MUST cite earn rate AND budget headroom AND utilization effect (SC-R-002). MUST NOT name a card that pushes utilization > 50% (hard-avoid).

recommended_card_id.description: MUST NOT be a candidate whose projected per-card or aggregate utilization exceeds 50%.

utilization_warning.description: true iff the recommended card's projected utilization lands in the 30–50% warn band.

utilization_source.description: assumed_healthy_default when CreditState was absent (FR-REW-003; Constitution VI v2.2.0 documented-default exception).

safe_to_act_deferred.description: true iff Cash Safety's SafeToActSignal overrode a spend-positive pick.

inputs.description: MUST include earn_rate, budget_headroom_cents, and utilization_before/after.
